name: Open Enrollment Reminder
subject: Action Required: Complete Your Benefits Enrollment by {{deadline}}
bodyPreview: Your open enrollment window closes on {{deadline}}. You have {{daysLeft}} days to review and submit your benefit elections for the {{planYear}} plan year.

name: Enrollment Confirmation
subject: Your Benefits Elections Are Confirmed — {{planYear}}
bodyPreview: Thank you, {{firstName}}! Your benefit elections for {{planYear}} have been submitted and confirmed. Coverage is effective {{effectiveDate}}.

name: Life Event Window Opening
subject: Update Your Benefits Following Your Recent Life Event
bodyPreview: A qualifying life event has been recorded for your account ({{eventType}}, {{eventDate}}). You have 30 days (until {{deadline}}) to update your benefit elections.

name: Life Event Window Expiring
subject: Reminder: Your Life Event Enrollment Window Closes in {{daysLeft}} Days
bodyPreview: Your enrollment window for your {{eventType}} life event closes on {{deadline}}. After this date, you will not be able to update your benefits until the next open enrollment.

name: COBRA Election Notice
subject: Important: Your COBRA Continuation Coverage Rights
bodyPreview: You have recently experienced a qualifying event that may affect your group health coverage. You have the right to elect COBRA continuation coverage. Your election deadline is {{electionDeadline}}.

name: Payroll Deduction Change
subject: Your Benefit Deductions Are Changing Starting {{effectiveDate}}
bodyPreview: Due to your recent benefit changes, your payroll deductions will be updated. New total deduction: ${{newAmount}}/paycheck (was ${{oldAmount}}/paycheck), effective {{effectiveDate}}.

name: Document Request
subject: Action Required: Documents Needed to Complete Your {{eventType}} Life Event
bodyPreview: To finalize your benefit changes for your {{eventType}} life event, please submit the following documents by {{deadline}}: {{documentList}}.

name: Coverage Effective Confirmation
subject: Your Coverage Is Now Active — {{planYear}}
bodyPreview: Your benefit coverage for {{planYear}} is now effective as of {{effectiveDate}}. Your ID cards will arrive within 10 business days.

name: Enrollment Not Started
subject: Urgent: Only {{daysLeft}} Days Left to Enroll in Benefits
bodyPreview: Our records show you have not yet started your {{planYear}} benefits enrollment. The enrollment window closes {{deadline}}. After this date, you will not have coverage for the plan year.

name: Dependent Age-Out Notice
subject: Important: {{dependentName}}'s Coverage Ends on {{endDate}}
bodyPreview: {{dependentName}} will age out of your benefit coverage on {{endDate}} (26th birthday). After this date, they will no longer be eligible for coverage under your plan.
